name: label-demo
visual_summary: Label Demo is a basic interactive label. It would be used to provide a brief description or hint about the purpose of a form field, button, or other UI element. This component is commonly used to guide the user's attention to the correct input field when there are multiple options.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready label component with the following characteristics:

Name: label-demo
Description: Label Demo is a basic interactive label. It would be used to provide a brief description or hint about the purpose of a form field, button, or other UI element. This component is commonly used to guide the user's attention to the correct input field when there are multiple options.
Style: minimal
Interactions: 
Tags: label, hint, description, form-field, ui-element

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
